mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: StemX is an educational platform built to connect young talent in Uzbekistan with knowledge, research, and practice in science, engineering, health, math, and technology. We strive to make quality education free and accessible to every student.
vision.title: Our vision
vision.text: We envision a future where quality knowledge is accessible to everyone, regardless of language or geography. Through our multilingual platform, we aim to build a global movement that supports young researchers.
